purpose: Select a public, reproducible, enterprise-shaped benchmark pool for KG candidate matching and embedding-model selection.

positive_pair_sources: same public entity id, same message thread id, same SEC CIK or ticker, same contract clause category, or known qrel relevance label
negative_pair_sources: same source family but different public entity id, same surface label with different FormOwl core supertype, same industry but different SEC CIK, or unrelated qrel/non-qrel pairs

recommended_strata.positive_signal: same normalized email address or thread id
recommended_strata.hard_negative_signal: same display name or organization domain but different message identity

recommended_strata.positive_signal: same document class or extracted organization/person anchor
recommended_strata.hard_negative_signal: visually or lexically similar document class with different FormOwl core supertype
same finance vocabulary without qrel relevance
same industry or similar issuer name with different CIK

recommended_strata.positive_signal: same clause category or annotated answer span
recommended_strata.hard_negative_signal: nearby legal clause with different obligation/risk category

sources.formowl_use: email identity, thread, person, organization, topic, and hard-negative matching
sources.license_or_access_note: public research corpus; verify redistribution terms before bundling raw data

sources.formowl_use: office-document source distribution, OCR/text extraction stress, ontology type-gate and document-class hard negatives
sources.license_or_access_note: public benchmark; keep raw images outside the repo and store only hashes/manifests

sources.public_size_note: financial question answering retrieval benchmark with corpus, queries, and qrels
sources.formowl_use: finance-domain semantic relevance, query-document matching, and hard negatives
sources.license_or_access_note: use dataset card/license metadata during downloader implementation

sources.public_size_note: official SEC data APIs and bulk data for company submissions and XBRL company facts
sources.formowl_use: issuer identity matching, CIK/ticker aliasing, fiscal-report entity resolution, same-industry hard negatives
sources.license_or_access_note: respect SEC fair-access guidance and user-agent requirements

sources.public_size_note: contract understanding dataset with hundreds of contracts and more than ten thousand expert annotations
sources.formowl_use: office/legal document semantic matching, clause type alignment, obligation/risk hard negatives
sources.license_or_access_note: verify current dataset terms before mirroring raw contracts

execution_requirements.raw_data_storage: keep downloaded public corpora outside git; store FormOwl locators, source locks, checksums, and sampling manifests only
must_not_claim: large benchmark result before the benchmark is actually executed
